name: Marinated Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 Thick flank steak or London broil (about 1 1/2 Pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the wine, soy sauce, and seasonings.
2. Place steak in a long glass baking dish and pour marinade over meat.
3. Cover and chill at least 12 to 18 hours, turning meat once or twice.
4. Preheat broiler.
5. Remove steak from marinade. Pat dry and broil 4 inches from heat for about 5 minutes on each side.
6. To serve, cut thin slices diagonally across grain. Serve with rice.
Yield: 6 servings
Calories: 270 per serving.
